name: MTP Group Fulfillment
description: Agent-invokable capabilities for the MTP Group fulfillment warehouse — order placement, inventory lookup, delivery tracking, and returns management via REST API.

authentication.description: UUID issued by MTP manager or obtained via /GetToken with login/password credentials.

skills.name: Create customer order
skills.description: Place a new customer order for fulfillment with Nova Poshta, Ukrposhta, own courier, or pickup delivery. Supports both private-person and legal-entity recipients.

skills.name: Edit existing order
skills.description: Update recipient contacts, delivery address, or payment form for an existing order. Uses key_order instead of id_order.

skills.name: Cancel order
skills.description: Cancel a pending order by its client-assigned id_order. Cannot cancel already-shipped orders.

skills.name: Check order status
skills.description: Retrieve current MTP and Nova Poshta status, TTN, delivery cost, and full Nova Poshta tracking history for one or more orders.

skills.name: List orders by date range
skills.description: Paginated list of all orders (up to 100 per page) created within a given date range, including products and delivery info.

skills.name: List customer returns
skills.description: Paginated list of returns received at the warehouse within a date range, including marriage (defective) flags.

skills.name: Create or update product
skills.description: Add a new SKU or update existing product metadata (name, barcode). Idempotent by SKU.

skills.name: Get stock levels
skills.description: Returns on-hand, available-for-sale, and accounting stock quantities for all SKUs. Can exclude zero-stock items.

skills.name: Product movement report
skills.description: Detailed inbound/outbound movement ledger for a specific SKU across a date range, with running balance and source documents.

skills.name: Create inbound delivery request
skills.description: Register an upcoming inbound delivery to the warehouse (via Nova Poshta or direct to warehouse).

skills.name: Check inbound delivery status
skills.description: Returns status (1=new, 2=arrived-not-fully-received, 3=completed) and line-item detail for an inbound delivery.

skills.name: List inbound delivery requests
skills.description: List all inbound delivery requests within a date range.

skills.name: Search Nova Poshta cities
skills.description: Find Nova Poshta cities by partial name — returns CityRef UUIDs needed for delivery addresses.

skills.name: List Nova Poshta warehouses
skills.description: Returns all Nova Poshta warehouses for a given city (by CityRef).

skills.name: List Nova Poshta senders
skills.description: Returns the list of legal entities registered as Nova Poshta senders for the client's MTP account.
